titleStmt.title: SII 6.1102: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1102. (A.R. No. 343-K of 1899). IN THE FORTY-FIFTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākēbdē bhujanāgabhānugaṇitē māsē śucau pū¨rnnimā
saṁyuktē śaśivāsarē naraharēḥ śrīsiṁhaśailēśituḥ . Agrē dīpayugapra
dīpanakṛtē nityaṁ śataṁ sadgavāṁ prādānnāraṇajīyyanō guṇanidhiḥ svābhīṣṭa
saṁsiddhayē . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1282 gunēṁṭi Āṣāḍa punnama
yu sōmavāramunāṁḍu tuḷaśiṁgāmuna mājinārāyaṇa
jīyana tanaku Abhīṣṭasiddhigā śrīnarasiṁhanātuni sannidhiya
ṁdu nityamunnu reṁḍu Akhaṁḍadīpālu veluṁguṭaku poṭnu
ri bāsubārakivaśamunaṁ beṭina mōdālu nūṟu lekka mō 100
Ītaṁḍu nelapaḍi neyi padēnu kuṁcālu tecci bhaṁḍāramaṁdu
pravēśamu cēyaṁgalaṁḍu I dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrī
Ī bāsubāraki kūṭikinni jītānaku poṭnuri nūṁkasāni pedda ceṟuvumaḍu
ṁgu venakanu gaṁgupaḍirāyani koḍuku saruvapaḍirāyanicēta gaṁḍamāḍa
lu 20 ṭiki puṭeṁḍu kṣētramunu bāranāyaku vēmāṁḍi kūnapanāya
nicē Iruvai māḍalakuṁ buṭṭeṁḍu kṣētramunuṁ krayamugoni Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
sthāIgaṁ beṭṭenu . Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pā
lanīyō(ni) manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syādha¨rmmaśśatru¨rnna kasyacit .
śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
